title: ruff-py-dto configuration
description: Config schema for the ruff-py-dto generic Python AST extractor.

root.description: Root directory of the Python source tree to scan.

include.description: Glob patterns for files to include.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude.

match.description: List of match rules; one pass over the tree evaluates all rules.

id.description: Identifier for this rule; appears as match_id in output bundles.

kind.description: AST shape to match. Only function_with_decorator is implemented in this iteration.

decorator.description: Selector for which decorator triggers this rule.

emit.description: Map from output field name to dot-path expression over the matched context.

attribute.description: Match decorators whose attribute name equals this value (e.g. 'route' for @bp.route).

name.description: Match decorators whose bare name equals this value.

min_positional_args.description: Minimum number of positional arguments the decorator call must have.

regex.description: Regex with a named capture group 'family' applied to the filename.
